Description: User authentication and project foundation setup.
Acceptance Criteria: High level scope: provide secure authentication using Laravel Sanctum, foundational user model and permissions, and hooks for CI/deployment migrations.

Description: Site creation and appliance catalog management.
Acceptance Criteria: High level: allow users to create a single site (MVP), store its metadata, and provide an appliance catalog for selection during estimation.

Description: Energy estimation and basic hardware recommendation.
Acceptance Criteria: High level: compute energy consumption estimates from user appliances and provide a simple rule-based hardware recommendation (panels, inverter, battery) backed by provider catalog.

Description: Minimal dev experience to support MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: High level: seed data, demo script and basic CI checks so developers can run a demo and tests locally and in CI.

Description: Project creation and manual installer assignment.
Acceptance Criteria: High level: allow customers to create projects from estimations and allow admins to assign installer profiles to projects.
High level: provide a simple upfront payment integration with a mock gateway for MVP and persisted payment records.
High level: minimal admin UIs and endpoints for managing hardware and user statuses.
